  [1] Potential reentrancy in function 'withdraw'
      contracts/Vault.sol:12  [reentrancy]

      │ (bool ok,) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}("");

      ℹ External interaction happens before a later state update.

      ✎ Move state updates before external calls.

      🏷  reentrancy, cei
